body.title: Adopt Fable's builder empirical program — price the model lever, resolve the harness-vs-floor confound, make the funnel a standing metric
body.text:
# D-fable-builder-empirical-program-2026-07-06
**title:** Adopt Fable's builder empirical program
**date:** 2026-07-06
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-qwen-vs-devstral-architect-probe, T-funnel-as-ci, T-funnel-2x2-model-harness-confound, T-consequence-fable-builder-empirical-program, T-review-builder-process-guardrails

## Decision narrative
Fable's 2026-07-06 strategic review (note cc.0.fable-review-builder-levers-2026-07-06) reframed four months of builder work: the program is not failing, it is mid-diagnosis, and the binding constraint is COST PER ITERATION of the outer experiment loop, not direction. Two confounds have poisoned every finding: (a) is the 0-edits wall a HARNESS gap or the MODEL below floor? (b) has the model lever ever been priced? This decision adopts the empirical spine that resolves both, cheapest-first.

Akien's two refinements: (1) aider is an EXTERNAL DEPENDENCY (pip install aider-chat, headless, throwaway clone) used as a black-box CONTROL ARM — never vendored into unseen_university/ (a prior AiderDevice attempt, T-aider-rack-device, was cancelled; aider stays a dependency, not a fork). (2) Pull the qwen3-coder:30b-vs-devstral-24b probe to the FRONT as its own cheapest ticket — iteration velocity is the binding constraint and a faster/stronger architect model compounds across every later experiment.

PRIOR ART (prior-art gate honored): T-aider-rack-device's cancellation is directly load-bearing — the last time a small model 'wouldn't edit', the root cause was tier-routing to qwen2.5:7b instead of a 32B model; with proper-tier routing, edits worked cleanly. So the model-floor/tier confound is REAL and untested for our current loop. This is the single strongest argument that the qwen probe is the right first move.

## Scope (Phase 0 only — Phases 1/2 held as gated followups, branch on Phase 0 data)
FILED NOW (Phase 0 — the empirical spine):
- T-qwen-vs-devstral-architect-probe (S, 0.7, head) — price the model lever on one ticket; latency + does-it-plan.
- T-funnel-as-ci (M, 0.6) — one-command versioned eval over a sealed ticket set (internal + ~5 external) with an append-only scoreboard.
- T-funnel-2x2-model-harness-confound (M, 0.55, gated on funnel-as-ci) — {DS,aider}x{devstral,qwen}; pre-registered decision rule resolves the confound.
- T-consequence-fable-builder-empirical-program (S, gate 2026-07-20).
ALREADY DELIVERED this session (not re-filed): the stuck-corpus label page (devlab/claudecode/stuck_corpus_label_page.py, commit 6394a341) — Phase-0 human-bottleneck item, shipped.

HELD as gated followups (NOT filed now — file after Phase 0 data, to avoid premature re-scoping):
- Phase 1: edit-format ladder + whole-file fallback + reflection for the editor (file after the 2x2 confirms harness-gap); classifier plumbing half (T-ds-defeating-question-classifier already exists — its plumbing half is hand-fixture buildable now, quality half gated on Akien's labels).
- Phase 2: nexus plan-cache write-path — T-nexus-write-path-ds-architect-loop ALREADY EXISTS in queue; Fable flags it UNDERPRICED (the plan is the intermediate representation; caching packet-fingerprint->plan->verdict triples is the cortical-columns thesis on the coding loop) — recommend a priority bump, not a re-file. OpenAI-compatible proxy endpoint (so aider bytes land in io_corpus) + AiderDevice on the 3 laptops (gated on the control arm winning + close-validation capacity priced). Replay wind-tunnel for harness changes.
- Standing habit changes (prior-art gate line in /sorted for L/HIGH-design-risk; every-flag-stamps-io_corpus audit-smell invariant): NOT left as a narrative recommendation — tracked as T-review-builder-process-guardrails (S, 0.75, high-priority design-review ticket that spawns the implementation tickets). Recommendations rot in narratives; tickets get worked (Akien 2026-07-06).

## Relationship to prior decisions
Extends D-coding-loop-redesign-aider-survey-2026-07-04 (which shipped the loop MECHANICS — architect/editor, repo-map, ACI) with the MEASUREMENT infrastructure + control arm that tells us whether those mechanics or the model tier is the limiter. Feeds D-ds-harvest-mode-coding-loop (the funnel + labeled corpus are its instruments) and the D-proof-program-grounding-spine (pre-registration + sealed slices are reused here).

## Hypothesis
After Phase 0 ships, a filled 2x2 scoreboard states WHERE the 0-edits failure lives (harness-gap vs model-floor vs tier-lever) rather than leaving it a guess, and the outer experiment loop runs materially faster (qwen-vs-devstral latency is a measured number; the funnel is one command that appends a scoreboard row).

## Measurement Signal
(1) qwen probe: wall-clock ms/turn for qwen3-coder:30b vs devstral-24b on the same ticket + a plan-substantive bool per arm. (2) 2x2 scoreboard per cell: plan? edits-attempted? edits-applied? tests-green? DONE? (3) funnel-as-CI: one command produces an append-only scoreboard artifact, internal + external slices distinguishable. Pre-registered decision rule (prereg.py): aider>DS same model => harness gap; DS-qwen>>DS-devstral => tier lever; all arms fail => model floor.

## Intention
I intend that every builder experiment costs less than the last and aims at a resolved confound rather than a guess — pricing the model lever, giving the outer loop a standing one-command metric, and using aider as a control arm — so DS.0 leveling proceeds on evidence, not blind tuning. Serves the DS.0-leveling north star and the compiled-inference telos (the plan is the IR the nexus will eventually cache).
